## Verdict & Recommendations

### ⭐⭐⭐⭐ ADSK — Autodesk, Inc. (4.0/5)
**Rating: SPECULATIVE BUY — Accumulate on Weakness**

**Bull Case:**
- 90.9% gross margin and 39% non-GAAP operating margin target
- Revenue growing 17–18% YoY consistently
- 60.9% upside to analyst consensus price target ($319)
- Q1 FY2027 beat with raised guidance
- RSI ~43 approaching oversold — potential technical bounce
- MaintainX strategically expands TAM into industrial operations (long-term positive)

**Bear Case:**
- Trading below ALL key moving averages (8/20/50/200-day)
- MACD bearish crossover — trend is down
- $3.6B all-cash MaintainX deal raises integration + leverage risk
- Stock down 28% from 52-week highs
- Near-term momentum clearly negative

**Action Plan:**
- **Entry zone:** $188–$196 (support zone)
- **Stop-loss:** $178
- **Targets:** $215 (ST) → $280 (6M) → $319 (12M)
- ⚠️ Do NOT chase at $198 — wait for price to stabilize above $205 on volume

---

### ⭐⭐⭐⭐ NOW — ServiceNow, Inc. (4.2/5)
**Rating: BUY / HOLD — Momentum Play**

**Bull Case:**
- 22% revenue growth — fastest among comparable enterprise software peers
- Now Assist AI: $1M+ ACV customers grew 130%+ YoY (strongest AI monetization proof)
- Platform moat via Moveworks + Veza + Armis acquisitions
- $5B buyback + $2B ASR = strong management conviction / capital return
- cRPO $12.64B (+22.5% YoY) provides high forward revenue visibility
- Price above VWAP and all short-term moving averages
- Anthropic partnership deepens AI capability

**Bear Case:**
- 52% below 52-week high ($211.48)
- Still far below 200-day SMA ($142.75)
- RSI ~73 = overbought in short term — pullback risk
- High P/E (62×) — priced for perfection
- Multiple concurrent integrations (Armis, Veza, Moveworks) = execution risk
- Salesforce competition intensifying in enterprise AI/CRM space

**Action Plan:**
- **Entry zone / Add:** $95–$98 (on dips)
- **Stop-loss:** $90
- **Targets:** $115 (ST breakout) → $143 (6M, 200d SMA reclaim) → $180 (12M)
- ⚠️ RSI overbought — do not chase above $108 without pullback

**ADSK Pattern Verdict:** 4 bearish patterns followed by 1 tentative hammer. Hammer at Jun 11 is not confirmed until price closes above $203 with expanding volume. Treat as watch only.

## Volume Profile — Analysis & Findings

### ADSK Volume Profile (30-Day, as of Jun 15, 2026)

**Point of Control (POC):** $215–220 zone (9.3M shares) — heaviest traded price level.

| Metric | Value | Interpretation |
|---|---|---|
| POC | $215–220 | Now acts as overhead resistance (~8% above current price) |
| Value Area High (VAH) | ~$225 | Upper boundary of 70% volume zone |
| Value Area Low (VAL) | ~$200 | Lower boundary — price is at/below VAL |
| Current Price vs VAL | $197–199 — BELOW VAL | Bearish: trading outside value area to the downside |
| High Volume Node (HVN) | $210–215 (6.3M) | Secondary resistance on any bounce |
| Low Volume Node (LVN) | $230–235 (4.1M) | If price ever reclaims, could move quickly through this zone |
| Current Zone Volume | $196–200 (5.2M) | Moderate volume = price finding no strong floor yet |

**Summary Finding:** ADSK is in a distribution phase. The 9.3M-share POC sits $16 above current price and will act as a major lid on any recovery rally. Bears control the tape until ADSK reclaims $205 (VAL) on strong volume. A failure to hold $196 opens $188.

## Dashboard Features

### Interactive Chart Capabilities (dashboard.html)

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| **Chart Ranges** | Daily (May 19–Jun 13), Weekly (Mar 3–Jun 13, 15 wks), Hourly (Apr 1–Jun 13, ~385 bars) |
| **Chart Styles** | Line, Candlestick (OHLC box), OHLC Bar — toggle in toolbar |
| **RSI Indicator** | RSI(5), RSI(10), RSI(20) — multi-select, shown as sub-panel below chart. OB/OS lines at 70/30 |
| **Bollinger Bands** | BB(10) for daily/weekly, BB(20) for hourly — upper/mid/lower bands with fill |
| **Fibonacci Retracement** | Auto-calculated from visible period high/low — 0%, 23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8%, 78.6%, 100% |
| **Candle Patterns** | 5 annotated patterns per stock on Daily + Candlestick/OHLC view |
| **Dark/Light Mode** | Full theme toggle with localStorage persistence |
| **Zoom/Pan** | Scroll-to-zoom + drag-to-pan on all price charts (Reset button available) |
| **Scroll Animation** | AOS fade-in on sections, CountUp on key numbers |
| **S/R Levels** | Dedicated card showing Daily + Weekly support/resistance with badge classifications |
| **Volume Profile** | Description text + summary findings below each VP chart |
| **Tooltips** | Tippy.js tooltips on RSI, MACD, EMA, SMA, VWAP, cRPO badges |
